title: GEAS Mission Spec
description: Canonical mission baseline approved during specifying phase. Captures mission intent, scope, completion criteria, constraints, and user approval.

mission_id.description: Stable mission identifier within the GEAS runtime.

domain_profile.description: Optional implementation-specific domain profile attached to the mission.

mode.description: Default operating depth for the mission.

mission.description: Core user request or mission objective this mission is meant to satisfy.

done_when.description: High-level completion statement used to judge whether the mission is done.

target_user.description: Intended recipient or consumer of the mission outcome.

user_approved.description: Whether the user has approved this mission spec as the current basis for execution.

in.description: In-scope surfaces or responsibilities owned by this mission.

out.description: Explicitly out-of-scope surfaces or responsibilities for this mission.

acceptance_criteria.description: Concrete criteria derived from done_when and used for phase gates and task derivation.

constraints.description: Non-negotiable constraints that shape how the mission may be executed.

affected_surfaces.description: Surfaces likely to be affected by the mission outcome.

risk_notes.description: Mission-level risks already visible before task execution begins.

assumptions.description: Current assumptions accepted for mission planning and execution.

ambiguities.description: Unresolved ambiguities that must stay visible during mission execution.
